name: Apollo
description: In ancient Greek religion and mythology, Apollo[a] is one of the Olympian deities. His numerous functions include healing, prophecy, music, poetry, and archery. He is the son of Zeus and Leto, and the twin brother of Artemis, goddess of the hunt. He is considered to be the most beautiful god and is represented as the ideal of the kouros (ephebe, or a beardless, athletic youth). In the 5th century BC, his worship was imported to Rome.

infobox.Symbol: Lyre, laurel wreath, python, bow and arrows
